title: Red Flight
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] unit|the [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing]] unit also known as [[Red Flight (K-wings)|Red Flight]]}} [[File:Adumarbattle.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Red Flight on [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].]] {{Quote|Red Leader has four lit and looking optimal.''"
"''Red Two. Four on-line, ready to fly.''"
"''Red Three. Anxious to show 'em what we can do.''"
"''Red Four. Four lit and in the green.|Red Flight, reporting in|''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''}} '''Red Flight''' was a temporary detachment of four [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] dispatched by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on a diplomatic mission to [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. The group was led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], selected by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to go as an [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Adumar. Instructed to bring three of the New Republic's best starfighter pilots, Wedge chose [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]], and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]]. Red Flight was stationed aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']]. As Adumari culture venerated fighter pilots, it was considered essential to send the most renowned pilots in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], despite their lack of any diplomatic training. The mission did not go as planned, but ultimately Red Flight succeeded through the rather undiplomatic means of overthrowing [[Perator]] [[Pekaelic ke Teldan]] of [[Cartann]], Adumar's largest and most powerful nation, in collaboration with many of its smaller rival nations. Cartann was supported by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Turr Phennir]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] delegate to Adumar, who led a flight from the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Group]] that was eventually defeated by Red Flight; out of the four [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] in the flight, only Phennir's survived. Three days later the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Agonizer (starship)|''Agonizer'']] returned at the head of a large Imperial task force with orders to conquer Adumar. However a combined New Republic and Adumari force, building on misinformation being fed to the Imperials about the situation planetside, was able to defeat the Imperials in the [[Battle of Adumar]]. Following the battle, Red Flight was disbanded and its pilots were returned to active service within [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. ==Members== *Red Leader - [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *Red 2 - [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] *[[Red Three/Legends|Red 3]] - [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] *Red 4 - [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Hobbie Klivian]] ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 50}} {{1st}} *''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:New Republic military units]]
